user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Tailspin Toys. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-24 11:15 EST
Subject: URGENT: migration architecture Issue at Tailspin Toys

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with migration architecture. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
Date: 2024-02-02 15:32 EST
Subject: Re: migration architecture Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about migration architecture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-12 17:21 EST
Subject: migration architecture - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with migration architecture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

Meeting: migration architecture Discussion - Tailspin Toys
Date: 2024-02-24
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), Priya (Tailspin Toys)

[00:01:30] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into migration architecture.

[00:06:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:11:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:14:00] Priya (Tailspin Toys): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is partner engagement.

[00:17:00] Priya (Tailspin Toys): On the migration architecture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:21:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:25:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about resource allocation. Can we address those?

[00:30:00] Priya (Tailspin Toys): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:33:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on budget approval and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.
